{"file_path":"/home/runner/work/Kody-Engine-Tester/Kody-Engine-Tester/.kody/tasks/2635-260418-095557/moonlit-wibbling-muffin.md","content":"# Plan: Add login and register route handlers

## Context

The codebase has a mature auth infrastructure using Payload CMS with a `JwtService` and `AuthService` (PBKDF2-based), but no Next.js route handlers expose these as HTTP endpoints. Two service-layer functions exist: `AuthService.login()` in `src/auth/auth-service.ts` and `register()` in `src/api/auth/register.ts`. This task creates the missing `POST /api/auth/login` and `POST /api/auth/register` route handlers.

---

## Approach

Follow the established Next.js route handler pattern used in `src/app/api/quizzes/[id]/route.ts` and `src/app/api/dashboard/admin-stats/route.ts`:
- Import `configPromise from '@payload-config'` and `getPayload from 'payload'`
- Create singleton instances of `JwtService` and `AuthService` (matching `withAuth.ts` pattern)
- Use `NextRequest` and `NextRes… [+3473 chars]

{"plan":"# Plan: Add login and register route handlers

## Context

The codebase has a mature auth infrastructure using Payload CMS with a `JwtService` and `AuthService` (PBKDF2-based), but no Next.js route handlers expose these as HTTP endpoints. Two service-layer functions exist: `AuthService.login()` in `src/auth/auth-service.ts` and `register()` in `src/api/auth/register.ts`. This task creates the missing `POST /api/auth/login` and `POST /api/auth/register` route handlers.

---

## Approach

Follow the established Next.js route handler pattern used in `src/app/api/quizzes/[id]/route.ts` and `src/app/api/dashboard/admin-stats/route.ts`:
- Import `configPromise from '@payload-config'` and `getPayload from 'payload'`
- Create singleton instances of `JwtService` and `AuthService` (matching `withAuth.ts` pattern)
- Use `NextRequest` and `NextResponse` from `next/server`

- Two new route handler files to create
- Reuse of the existing singleton pattern from `src/auth/withAuth.ts`
- Reuse of `AuthService.login()` and `register()` from the service layer
